summary: Completed E2E testing of Chat Settings and Chat System. All 31 backend tests passed (100%). The configurable polling interval feature is working correctly - Admin can set it from Settings -> Chat tab (1-60 seconds range), and the ChatWidget uses the public endpoint to fetch and apply the interval.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat system fully tested. The polling interval is now configurable from Admin Settings -> Chat tab. Current interval is set to 10 seconds. All chat features work: list chats, create chat for order, send messages, file upload (2MB limit), unread counts, multi-role access.

chat_settings_api.GET /api/admin/chat-settings: PASS - Returns full settings with admin auth, denied for reseller
chat_settings_api.PUT /api/admin/chat-settings: PASS - Updates settings, validates interval range (1-60)

chat_settings_ui.settings_page_chat_tab: PASS - Chat tab visible with polling interval input
chat_settings_ui.update_polling_interval: PASS - Can update from 60 to 15 seconds, toast shows success
chat_settings_ui.persistence: PASS - Settings persisted and reflected in public API

chat_widget.widget_button: PASS - Floating button visible at bottom-right with unread badge
chat_widget.chat_list: PASS - Shows reseller's chats only (data isolation working)
chat_widget.conversation_view: PASS - Shows messages, participants (Trump, Donald, Factory)
chat_widget.send_message: PASS - Can type and send messages
chat_widget.participants_display: PASS - Shows Trump, Donald (Sales Partner), Factory (Admin)

chat_api.GET /api/chats: PASS - Returns chats based on user role
chat_api.GET /api/chats/order/{order_id}: PASS - Creates or retrieves chat for order

data_isolation.reseller_chat_access: PASS - Resellers only see chats where reseller_email matches

features_tested.configurable_polling_interval: PASS - Admin sets 1-60 sec interval, ChatWidget uses it
features_tested.chat_creation: PASS - Create chat for order between reseller and admin
features_tested.send_text_message: PASS - Text messages sent and received
features_tested.file_upload: PASS - Files up to 2MB can be uploaded, larger rejected
features_tested.unread_count: PASS - Badge shows correct unread count
features_tested.multi_role_access: PASS - Admin sees all, reseller sees own chats only
